name: Christopher Gist
description: From Assassin's Creed: Rogue - Christopher Gist was an accomplished American explorer, surveyor and frontiersman, and a member of the British and Colonial Rites of the Templar Order. During the Seven Years' War, he served as the first mate aboard Shay Cormac's ship, the Morrigan, and later oversaw the purge of the Colonial Brotherhood of Assassins following Shay's departure to Europe.
creator: Charlize_Lee
